name: Turmeric Acquisition Corp.
summary: Turmeric Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. It focuses on effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is headquartered in Cambridge, Massachusetts. Turmeric Acquisition Corp. operates as a subsidiary of Turmeric Management, LLC.
